name: Total-control task title hygiene
definitionOfDone: AMCore records the total-control task title writing rules
LINE-derived task titles use human conversation labels instead of technical IDs
Notion page IDs, LINE group IDs, LINE user IDs, room IDs, message IDs, and sync IDs are blocked from task titles
Technical IDs remain available in source/debug fields
Existing project-local task titles are scanned and cleaned
Project manifest and upgrade record are updated after verification
